---
title: "Figures and Tables for LTA"
author: "Annie Green Howard"
date: today
format: pdf
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scales)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)


setwd("C:\\Users\\aghoward\\OneDrive - University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill\\UNC\\LCA")
```

## Formatting Data

```{r}
df <- read_csv("param_best_model_model_output_for_plot.csv")


df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("Class"),
    names_to = c("Class", "Year"),
    names_pattern = "Class(\\d+)_(\\d+)",
    values_to = "prob"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Class = factor(paste0("Class ", Class)),
    Year  = factor(Year)
  )


df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    # order legend by variable first, then by category *within* variable
    categories = fct_reorder(
      categories,
      as.numeric(factor(variable)),
      .fun = mean
    )
  )


library(RColorBrewer)

n_cats <- nlevels(df_long$categories)

pal <- colorRampPalette(
  c(brewer.pal(8, "Set1"),
    brewer.pal(8, "Set2"),
    brewer.pal(8, "Set3"))
)(n_cats)

p <- ggplot(df_long,
       aes(x = Class, y = prob, fill = categories)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.2) +
  facet_grid(variable ~ Year) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal) +
  labs(
    x = "Class",
    y = "Response Probabilities",
    fill = "Variables"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


ggsave(
  filename = "stacked_response_probabilities_by_class.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

p
```
```{r}
lca_descript <- read_csv("data_set_with_classes.csv")
```


## Now generating talbe for 2009

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

summary_table_2009 <- lca_descript %>%
  # keep ID, class, and only 2009 variables
  select(indexno, class_09_ml, ends_with("_2009")) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(indexno, class_09_ml),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    base_var = str_remove(variable, "_2009")
  ) %>%
  
  # identify binary vs continuous variables
  group_by(base_var) %>%
  mutate(
    is_binary = all(na.omit(value) %in% c(0, 1))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # summarize within 2009 latent class
  group_by(base_var, is_binary, class_09_ml) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n1   = sum(value == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  
  # format values for table display
  mutate(
    value_display = if_else(
      is_binary,
      paste0(
        round(mean * 100), "% (N = ", n1, ")"
      ),
      paste0(
        round(mean, 1),
        " (",
        round(sd, 1),
        ")"
      )
    ),
    class_09_ml = paste0("Class ", class_09_ml)
  ) %>%
  
  select(base_var, class_09_ml, value_display) %>%
  
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = class_09_ml,
    values_from = value_display
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(base_var)

summary_table_2009

```

## Output summary table 

```{r}
write.csv(
  summary_table_2009,
  file = "lca_2009_summary.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

## Now doing N's

```{r}
table(lca_descript$class_09_ml)
```

## Talbe for 2019

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

summary_table_2019 <- {

  ## ---- 1. Build the main summary table (2019 only) ----
  main_table <- lca_descript %>%
    select(indexno, class_19_ml, ends_with("_2019")) %>%
    
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -c(indexno, class_19_ml),
      names_to = "variable",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    
    mutate(
      base_var = str_remove(variable, "_2019")
    ) %>%
    
    group_by(base_var) %>%
    mutate(
      is_binary = all(na.omit(value) %in% c(0, 1))
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    
    group_by(base_var, is_binary, class_19_ml) %>%
    summarise(
      mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd   = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
      n1   = sum(value == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    
    mutate(
      value_display = if_else(
        is_binary,
        paste0(round(mean * 100), "% (N = ", n1, ")"),
        paste0(round(mean, 1), " (", round(sd, 1), ")")
      ),
      class_19_ml = paste0("Class ", class_19_ml)
    ) %>%
    
    select(base_var, class_19_ml, value_display) %>%
    
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = class_19_ml,
      values_from = value_display
    ) %>%
    
    arrange(base_var)

  ## ---- 2. Create Total N row ----
  n_row <- lca_descript %>%
    filter(!is.na(class_19_ml)) %>%
    count(class_19_ml) %>%
    mutate(
      class_19_ml = paste0("Class ", class_19_ml),
      value_display = paste0("N = ", n)
    ) %>%
    select(class_19_ml, value_display) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from  = class_19_ml,
      values_from = value_display
    ) %>%
    mutate(base_var = "Total N") %>%
    select(base_var, everything())

  ## ---- 3. Bind N row to top ----
  bind_rows(n_row, main_table)
}

summary_table_2019
```

## Output summary table 

```{r}
write.csv(
  summary_table_2019,
  file = "lca_2019_summary.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

## Now doing N's

```{r}
table(lca_descript$class_19_ml)
```

## Now transition plot
```{r}
class_labels <- c(
  "1" = "Class 1 – Rural PCPs",
  "2" = "Class 2 – Ob-gyns",
  "3" = "Class 3 – Urban ambulatory care PCPs",
  "4" = "Class 4 – Urban non-ambulatory care PCPs"
)
```

Now table

```{r}
# --- Restrict to individuals observed in both years ---
lca_class_combine <- lca_descript %>%
  filter(!is.na(class_09_ml), !is.na(class_19_ml)) %>%
  mutate(
    class_09_label = factor(
      as.character(class_09_ml),
      levels = names(class_labels),
      labels = class_labels
    ),
    class_19_label = factor(
      as.character(class_19_ml),
      levels = names(class_labels),
      labels = class_labels
    )
  )

# --- Create transition table ---
tab_class <- table(
  lca_class_combine$class_09_label,
  lca_class_combine$class_19_label
)

# --- Add row and column totals ---
tab_class_with_margins <- addmargins(tab_class)

# --- Convert to data frame and label totals ---
tab_class_df <- as.data.frame.matrix(tab_class_with_margins) %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "2009 Class")

names(tab_class_df)[ncol(tab_class_df)] <- "2019 Total"

tab_class_df$`2009 Class` <- ifelse(
  tab_class_df$`2009 Class` == "Sum",
  "2009 Total",
  tab_class_df$`2009 Class`
)

# --- Write to CSV ---
write.csv(
  tab_class_df,
  file = "class_transition_table_2009_2019.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
# --- Prepare Sankey data ---
sankey_class <- lca_descript %>%
  filter(!is.na(class_09_ml), !is.na(class_19_ml)) %>%
  mutate(
    class_09_label = factor(
      as.character(class_09_ml),
      levels = names(class_labels),
      labels = class_labels
    ),
    class_19_label = factor(
      as.character(class_19_ml),
      levels = names(class_labels),
      labels = class_labels
    )
  ) %>%
  count(class_09_label, class_19_label, name = "n")

# --- Sankey plot ---
p_class <- suppressWarnings(
  ggplot(
    sankey_class,
    aes(
      axis1 = class_09_label,
      axis2 = class_19_label,
      y     = n
    )
  ) +
    geom_alluvium(
      aes(fill = class_09_label),
      width = 1/12,
      alpha = 0.85
    ) +
    geom_stratum(
      width = 1/12,
      fill  = "grey90",
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      stat = "stratum",
      aes(label = str_wrap(after_stat(stratum), 30)),
      size = 3.2,
      lineheight = 0.9,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(
      limits = c("2009 Class", "2019 Class"),
      expand = c(0.15, 0.25)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      title    = "Latent Class Transitions from 2009 to 2019",
      subtitle = "Restricted to physicians observed in both years",
      y        = "Number of Physicians",
      x        = NULL,
      fill     = "2009 Class"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position     = "right",
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      plot.margin        = margin(t = 10, r = 90, b = 10, l = 90)
    )
)

# --- Save to PNG ---
ggsave(
  filename = "class_sankey_2009_2019.png",
  plot     = p_class,
  width    = 11,
  height   = 6.5,
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)
```
